Title: Meier, Hans
Overview: Collaborated with Fritz Saxl on Verzeichnis astrologischer und mythologischer illustrierter Handschriften des lateinischen Mittelalters (1915). At the urging of Saxl, his Verzeichnis was completed by the young Ph.D. student Harry Bober. Died in an air raid.
Selected Bibliography: and Saxl, Fritz. Verzeichnis astrologischer und mythologischer illustrierter Handschriften des lateinischen Mittelalters. volume 1 (only), Heidelberg: C. Winter, 1915; and Saxl, Fritz. Zucchi, Jacopo. Antike Götter in der Spätrenaissance. Berlin: B. G. Teubner, 1927; A Bibliography of the Survival of the Classics [covering years 1931-1932/33]. 2 vols. London: Warburg Institute, 1934-38;
